title: Bootstrap should stay conservative when history conflicts
why_this_case_exists: Historical docs are often noisy. Bootstrap should avoid writing overconfident rules from weak or conflicting evidence.
setup: The same source term is translated in multiple conflicting ways across the corpus.
There is not enough evidence to choose one strong global rule safely.
expected: The resulting memory is cautious or leaves the term unresolved.
The output avoids strong project-wide claims from weak evidence.
should_not_happen: The tool hard-codes one strong rule from obviously conflicting examples.
The wording sounds more confident than the evidence supports.
